description: List configured LLM backends and report which ones support vision/multimodal input (covers the multimodal capability chain — a core NeoMind differentiator, previously 0 coverage)

turns.user: Which LLM backends are configured in the system right now, and which of them support image input? Summarize as a list.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent invokes `neomind llm list` (or GET /api/llm-backends) and reports the multimodal capability of each backend
expectations.overall: Must at minimum identify the currently active backend (eval-agent) and report its multimodal status
